criteria.name: Fast Test Suite Passes
criteria.evidence: 229 passed, 1 skipped, 0 failed in 85.71s. All 3 previously-failing tests (test_north_rustico_data_in_output, test_qa_qc_has_all_stations, test_zero_unprocessed_files) now pass.

summary: Ralph fixed all 3 pipeline regression issues flagged in the previous REJECT: (1) unprocessed_count back to 0 by checking disk for stations with output instead of current-run list; (2) QA/QC report restored to 6 stations via _collect_qa_qc_data helper that includes disk-resident stations not in current run; (3) North Rustico test aligned with cleaning-config.json date truncation (2023-04-01). Code refactor is clean: on-demand station loading avoids OOM, helper extraction reduces complexity, ruff passes. All 229 tests pass.
